title: More Golden Food
description: Adds many new golden versions of food
body:
### More Golden Food adds many new versions of golden food to minecraft
![All new Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a747e394d1d4b26652c806f371eaabf26bb0acbe.png)

**The items have different crafting recipes than vanilla, so mods like JEI are highly recommended**

**The items give effects to the player, just like regular Golden Apples**


*For now, the mod only works on Forge. 1.20-1.22 Ports coming soon
